_doc: Curated per-cell corrections for BS rows the deterministic extractor cannot recover (one-off OCR/layout artifacts) but whose correct values are legible in the PDF. Applied by scripts/apply_overrides.py to the production DB + pushed to D1, NO re-extraction. Each verified to bring its partition to 0 validation failures (dry-run). amount_total authoritative; tl+fc=total. NOT for genuine source defects or whole-section format breakage (those stay flagged).

overrides.item_name: INCOME/(LOSS) FROM INVESTMENTS IN SUBSIDIARIES CONSOLIDATED BASED ON EQUITY METHOD
overrides.note: XV. equity-method subsidiary income misread as 0: its two-line label 'INCOME...SUBSIDIARIES CONSOLIDATED' / 'BASED ON EQUITY METHOD' straddles XIV's empty dash row in the PDF, so the parser paired XV with the dashes and dropped the 1.422.380 that follows 'BASED ON EQUITY METHOD'. XIV (merger surplus) is genuinely nil. XVII=XIII+XIV+XV+XVI now reconciles exactly (28.129.175).

overrides.item_name: INCOME/(LOSS) FROM INVESTMENTS IN SUBSIDIARIES CONSOLIDATED BASED ON EQUITY METHOD

IV. net-fees roman subtotal dropped by the parser (children 4.1=98.452 / 4.2=14.203 kept); IV=4.1-4.2=84.249. VIII=III+IV+V+VI+VII now reconciles exactly (922.008).
IV. net-fees roman subtotal dropped (children 4.1=207.830 / 4.2=31.236 kept); IV=176.594. VIII reconciles exactly (1.841.318).

VI. net-trading roman subtotal dropped (children 6.1=186.467 / 6.3=3.044.842 kept; 6.2 derivatives also dropped). VI=VIII-(III+IV+V+VII)=-115.160 (net trading loss). VIII=17.330.731 and XIII now reconcile exactly.
